description_long: This is a young adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a hooded jacket with a prominent front zipper and detailed patches on the chest and upper arm. The jacket has a fitted, ribbed hem and cuffs, and is layered over a high-collared shirt or scarf that covers the lower face. The pants are loose-fitting, cargo-style with side pockets, and are paired with modern sneakers. The figure's hands are gloved, and the hair is styled in a tousled, medium-length cut. The back of the jacket displays a large, circular graphic, adding to the streetwear aesthetic.
description: A young adult male in urban streetwear, featuring a hooded jacket with patches, cargo pants, gloves, and sneakers. The figure has a covered lower face and tousled medium-length hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the jacket's patches, high collar covering the lower face, and the overall stance with hands slightly apart.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the jacket's profile, hood, and the layered look of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large circular graphic on the back of the jacket and the relaxed fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the jacket's sleeve details and the side cargo pocket.
attribute_clothing_type: urban hooded jacket with patches, high-collared inner layer, cargo pants, gloves, and modern sneakers
